zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Hyde於1228年之前出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，她的父親John de Hyde28歲，母親Elizabeth de Sudley19歲。她於大約1248年與Thomas Joslyn在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1277年在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Hyde于1228年之前出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，她的父亲John de Hyde28岁，母亲Elizabeth de Sudley19岁。她于大约1248年与Thomas Joslyn在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1277年在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Hyde was born before 1228, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Hyde, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth de Sudley, was 19. She married Thomas Joslyn about 1248, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1277, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Hyde est née avant 1228, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Hyde, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Sudley, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Joslyn environ 1248, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1277, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Hyde vor 1228 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Hyde 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Sudley 19. Sie hat um 1248 in England Thomas Joslyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1277 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Hyde è nata il prima del 1228 nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Hyde, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Sudley, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Joslyn circa 1248, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1277, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Hydeが1228年以前にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Hydeは28歳，母Elizabeth de Sudleyは19歳であった。約1248年にイギリスでThomas Joslynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1277年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Hyde(이)가 1228년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Hyde(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Sudley(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1248년 영국에서 Thomas Joslyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Hyde nasceu antes 1228, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Hyde, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Sudley, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Joslyn aproximadamente 1248, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1277, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Hyde родилась перед 1228 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Hyde было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Sudley, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Joslyn около 1248 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1277 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Hyde nació antes de 1228, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Hyde, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Sudley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomas Joslyn aproximadamente 1248, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1277, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
